description: Split monolithic 850-line README into focused docs. Remove stale npm/npx references, fix CLI reference, extract architecture and enforcement docs. ADR-2603222136.

phases.name: Extract architecture docs
phases.description: Move system components, hexagonal layers, SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, hex-agent, dashboard sections from README into docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

tasks.name: Create docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
tasks.description: Extract system architecture diagram, SpacetimeDB section, hex-nexus section, hex-agent section, dashboard section, inference section from README. Add table of contents. Ensure all diagrams are preserved.

phases.name: Extract CLI reference
phases.description: Create accurate CLI reference from hex --help output. Remove stale commands.

tasks.name: Create docs/CLI-REFERENCE.md
tasks.description: Generate CLI reference from actual hex --help, hex adr --help, hex enforce --help, hex agent --help, hex test --help, hex swarm --help, hex task --help, hex plan --help output. Include examples. Remove commands that don't exist (hex build, hex orchestrate, hex setup, hex hub).

phases.name: Extract enforcement and development docs
phases.description: Create ENFORCEMENT.md (3-layer architecture) and DEVELOPMENT.md (build, test, contribute).

tasks.name: Create docs/ENFORCEMENT.md
tasks.description: Document 3-layer enforcement: client hooks (Claude Code), MCP tool guards (any provider), nexus API middleware (server-side). Include IEnforcementPort, DefaultEnforcer, enforcement modes, hex enforce CLI, system prompt for open models.

tasks.name: Create docs/DEVELOPMENT.md
tasks.description: Build instructions (cargo build, bun build), test instructions (hex test, cargo test, bun test), project structure, contribution guide, CI pipeline. Extract from README + CLAUDE.md.

phases.name: Rewrite README.md
phases.description: Rewrite README to < 200 lines: banner, description, quick start with real commands, simplified architecture diagram, links to docs/.

tasks.name: Rewrite README.md
tasks.description: Keep: banner, badges, one-paragraph description. Add: Quick Start with hex binary commands (not npx). Add: simplified architecture diagram. Add: links to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/CLI-REFERENCE.md, docs/ENFORCEMENT.md, docs/DEVELOPMENT.md. Remove: npm install, SPECKit/BMAD comparison, inline code examples > 10 lines, TS CLI references, notification channels, token summaries (move to docs/).

success_metrics: README.md is < 200 lines and contains only accurate information
No references to npm install, npx, or TypeScript CLI
All CLI commands in docs match hex --help output
